query:
-- Get ABC Furniture ID
SELECT id, companyName FROM companies WHERE companyName LIKE '%ABC%' LIMIT 1;

-- Insert batch-customer associations for all 4 batches
INSERT INTO variant_customer_links (variantId, customerId)
SELECT v.id, (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE companyName LIKE '%ABC%' LIMIT 1)
FROM product_variants v
WHERE v.productId = 60016
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM variant_customer_links vcl 
    WHERE vcl.variantId = v.id
  );
